series_metadata.series_description: Business operations reports detailing HR activity, performance data, training, software research, product suppliers and cost information for the bureau projects within the Office of Employee and Business Services. Includes HR strength reports, monthly trends report, and various ad hoc reports recommending a particular course of action.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 3 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office 3 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
